disclaimer: This roadmap is a public planning aid. It can change based on community needs, technical findings, security work, and operational reality. It is not a promise of dates, financial outcomes, listings, app-store approval, or legal status.

items.title: Public node monitoring, audit exports, storage health, and deployment checks
items.summary: Production health endpoints, storage validation, public audit manifests, E2E checks, and deployment metadata are live.

items.title: Wallet and transaction safety v2
items.summary: Send review, address validation, duplicate-send protection, pending status clarity, and backup education are live.

items.title: Community identity and moderation v2
items.summary: Wallet-control profile verification, trust labels, reports, and protected moderation tools are live.

items.title: API versioning and SDK compatibility layer
items.summary: API v1 aliases, request IDs, stable error metadata, and SDK v1 defaults are live.

items.title: Public roadmap, releases, changelog API, and upgrade guidance
items.summary: Canonical version metadata, roadmap and release pages, changelog API, and operator upgrade docs are being added.

items.title: Mobile backup, verification, and release-readiness improvements
items.summary: Improve mobile backup clarity, verification flows, and device QA before broader distribution.

items.title: Self-hosted node upgrade and diagnostics workflow
items.summary: Expand operator guidance, node health checks, and safer update instructions for self-hosted nodes.

items.title: Community node onboarding and registry trust signals
items.summary: Support more public nodes with clear registry metadata, reliability signals, and safe setup docs.

items.title: Scale chain reads and public API caching
items.summary: Research safer pagination, caching, and read performance as public chain and community activity grow.

items.title: Independent security review process
items.summary: Define scope and process for future independent review without claiming a completed external audit before it exists.

items.category: App Store and Google Play readiness
items.title: App-store readiness review
items.summary: Research store policy, privacy disclosures, wallet-safety messaging, and mobile build requirements.

items.title: Small community pilot programs
items.summary: Explore low-risk community pilots with clear responsible-use disclosures and no promise of financial outcomes.
